title: Recursive Summarization
scenario: Create a recursive summarization prompt for an LLM to condense a large text into a 5-sentence summary. The text provided will be a lengthy article with multiple sections. The LLM should identify key points, eliminate redundant information, and prioritize essential content. The output should be a concise summary with proper grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
constraints: Must include the original text's title in the summary

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated summary adheres to the given constraints, including word count, tone, and inclusion of the original title.
The summary is coherent, conveying the main ideas of the original text.
The summary demonstrates proper use of grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
The summary effectively eliminates redundant information, highlighting essential content.
